message:
Clean up gateway services: remove dead code, fix lint warnings

Systematic pass across gateway services addressing accumulated lint
and dead code issues:

- Remove unused imports (getChecksumAge, SystemSnapshot, logCliCommand,
  logCliWarning, sendValidationError, ToolDefinition, inArray, Cpu,
  Mail, Terminal icons)
- Prefix genuinely unused parameters with underscore (agentType,
  currentLifecycleState, tracked, stdout, error, key)
- Replace string concatenation with template literals for consistency
  (rch.service, ru-sweep, ru-sync, update-checker, agent-health,
  cli-logging test)
- Remove dead switch cases ("=" and ";") in pipeline.service tokenizer
  that fell through to the default error throw anyway
- Prefix unused ListBeadsQuerySchema with underscore (beads route)
- Prefix _MAX_LOG_BYTES constant (rch.service, currently unused)
- Remove dead _widgetConfigStr and biome-ignore comment (dashboard hook
  was computing a JSON string that was never read)
- Fix formatting in beads.service and connection.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
